title: Plants Plus
description: This resource pack adds over 10 new plants to your game, while revamping some of the already existing ones.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8995d6ec171da14bb80a230c7de8753df270b913.png)
# Description
This resource pack changes some of the plants in the game into reimagined ones, while updating the textures of some and changing others into completely different plants!

<details>
<summary>New Plants Spoiler</summary>

## New Plants:
**Vanilla → Updated**

Dandelion → Moonbloom

Orange Tulip → Cotton Plant

Bush → Clover Sprouts

Torchflower → Four Leaf Clover

Firefly Bush → Lavender



</details>

## Features
**Updated Textures**
### Vines
Made the texture smoother with more colours and made it blend better with the jungle biome.

### Wither Rose
Made the texture look much more wilted and depressing to emphasise the withering effect on the flower.

### Lily Pad
Made the texture rounder and darker to fit better with the dark atmosphere of the swamp biome.
![Updated Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48ba4d4a46a1c42ed5d3e90864224a77a2da2aaf.png)

## Other Features
- Lavender emits small petals at night
- Four Leaf Clover is the epic rating to reflect it's rarity in real life
- Four Leaf Clover cannot be found in any other means than the mysterious seeds to reflect how hard it is to find in real life.


<details>
<summary>Supported Versions</summary>

[1.21.9](https://modrinth.com/discover/resourcepacks?v=1.21.9)

[1.21.10](https://modrinth.com/discover/resourcepacks?v=1.21.10)
